cpu: AMD Ryzen 3 2200G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: Game works perfect so far. Full HD, High Settings, VSync On > Very smooth. Controller must be set in options(Using Sony DS4) . With 3.7.6 it doesnt work. Game starts but every input is not recognized properly, game crashes. Use 3.1.6-6 and it should work perfect.
title: Split/Second

notes: multiplayer was not tested. campaign works as expected. had to reduce graphics quality
title: Split/Second

notes: Keys in intro video freeze the game. Unplayable. Use 3.16-8 which works, using Steam controllers as keyboards inputs. Xbox joystick support lack.
title: Split/Second

notes: Regression notified to Valve on 4.2-2, tweaks required for joystick support with Steam controller and xbox360 pad: https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/2257#issuecomment-484494262
